detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use axicdma driver.

sect1.title: xaxicdma_example_hybrid_intr.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxicdma driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver to transfer packets in hybrid transfer mode through interrupt.

sect1.title: xaxicdma_example_hybrid_poll.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxicdma driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver to transfer packets in hybrid transfer mode without interrupt.

sect1.title: xaxicdma_example_sg_intr.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxicdma driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver to transfer packets in scatter gather transfer mode through interrupt.

sect1.title: xaxicdma_example_sg_poll.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxicdma driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver to transfer packets in scatter gather transfer mode without interrupt.

sect1.title: xaxicdma_example_simple_intr.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxicdma driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver to transfer packets in simple transfer mode through interrupt.

sect1.title: xaxicdma_example_simple_poll.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxicdma driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver to transfer packets in simple transfer mode without interrupt.
